query: Scaffold infrastructure for a media-heavy app. Org: bravo, project: clipmgr. I'll need blob storage (for video uploads) and Application Insights for observability. SQL too. Production should alert ops@bravo.com on errors.
context: Empty working directory. User has already run claude plugin install for azure-lean-stack.
expected_behavior: Claude generates infra/main.bicep with deploySql=true, deployStorage=true, deployObservability=true
Claude routes to optimizing-azure-blob-storage-cost for the Storage module (lifecycle rules)
Claude routes to instrumenting-azure-app-insights for the App Insights module
The generated main.bicep wires alertEmail through to the App Insights module
The generated main.bicep applies per-env SKU: SWA Free in test, Standard in prod
The Storage module is configured with lifecycle rules (Hot→Cool@60d→Cold@180d), NOT tierToArchive
Claude does NOT generate a Function App at this stage (not requested)
Claude reminds the user that SWA location is hard-coded to eastasia
